notes: Monetization backlash hit hard. EU DAU cratered 18% below baseline (285K vs 348K) after players discovered regional pricing disparity — EU cosmetic bundles were 40% more expensive than NA equivalents post-tournament. Reddit and social media amplified the story. EU ARPPU collapsed from $14.80 baseline to $8.90 as whales stopped spending. EU churn spiked to 8.2%. Refund rate surged to 6.8% globally (17x baseline). Support tickets hit 14,200 (4.4x baseline), dominated by refund requests and EU pricing complaints. German consumer protection authority (BfJ) issued informal inquiry. ASM-0007 ('EU pricing parity maintained within 10% of NA') expired — actual disparity was 40%. ASM-0009 ('Refund rate stays below 2%') expired. DRIFT-0015 flagged EU revenue cliff. DRIFT-0016 flagged regulatory exposure in DE/FR. DRIFT-0017 flagged JP localization errors in tournament store (wrong currency symbols). DLR-0032 ratified EU pricing audit. DLR-0033 ratified emergency refund policy expansion.
